name: Impossible Turkey & Stuffing Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Green onions with tops, sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Grease a 9-inch pie plate.
3. Arrange the diced turkey in the center of the pie plate.
4. Sprinkle seasoned salt over the turkey.
5. Scatter the stuffing pieces and green onions on top of the turkey.
6. Add the peas around the stuffing.
7. In a blender, combine milk, eggs, and Bisquick. Blend until smooth (about 15 seconds).
8. Pour the mixture over the turkey in the pie plate.
9. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean.
10. Let cool for 5 minutes before serving with hot turkey gravy. Makes 6 servings.
